bank.retain_mission: Extract chief-of-staff and agents-orchestrator decisions on prioritization, coordination, and orchestration.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about leadership cadence, decision rights, and orchestration patterns across agents and teams. Ignore one-off scheduling.

mental_models.name: Leadership Cadence
mental_models.source_query: What is the leadership operating cadence? Include forums, decision rights, and follow-through.

mental_models.name: Orchestration Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What orchestration patterns work across agents and teams? Include handoffs and accountability.
